title: Privacy settings for Recommendations & offers in Windows 11
license_note: Screenshots from support.microsoft.com. Confirm redistribution with your legal team before use in a shipped product.

steps.text: Select Privacy & security and choose General .
Choose your preferred setting for Let apps show my personalized ads by using my advertising ID .

sections.title: Website access of the language list

steps.text: Select Privacy & security and choose General .
Choose your preferred setting for Let websites show me locally relevant content by accessing my language list .
Select Privacy & security and choose General .
Choose your preferred setting for Let Windows improve Start and search results by tracking app launches .
